args:
set -eu
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/invalid-subset.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/build.invalid_subset_scope.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
shrink_json="$trace_dir/shrink.json"
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json > "$shrink_json"
python3 - "$shrink_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert obj['outTrace'].endswith('.min.fozzy')
assert obj['summary']['status'] in ('pass', 'fail')
PY
printf 'shrink-invalid-subset-scope\n'
